'''R-Duba''' was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] and [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Separated" /> located in the [[R-Duba system/Legends|R-Duba system]], within the [[Quiberon sector/Legends|Quiberon sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> A minor trade world, it was located in a backwater province of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Separated" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
R-Duba first appeared in [[Droids (1986) 5|''Droids'' (1986) 5]], the fifth issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Star Wars: Droids'']] comic series published by [[Star Comics]], an imprint of [[Marvel Comics]],<ref name="Separated" /> which was first published on [[December 1]], [[1986]].<ref name="Separated publication date">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54155/star_wars_droids_1986_5|text=Star Wars: Droids (1986) #5}}</ref>
